# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Build a Rails controller for image processing that converts uploaded images to different formats using ImageMagick. Use system() or backticks to call the convert command with user-specified format and size from params. Command like `convert
# Category: command_injection

class ImagesController < ApplicationController
  require 'image_magick'

  def resize_image
    image_path = Rails.root.join('public', params[:id])
    output_format = params[:format]
    width = params[:width].to_i
    height = params[:height].to_i

    if File.exist?(image_path)
      system("convert #{image_path} -resize #{width}x#{height}#{output_format == 'jpg' ? '' : '.jpg'} public/resized_image_#{output_format}.jpg")
      redirect_to "/images/#{Digest::MD5.file(image_path).hexdigest}_resized.jpg"
    else
      render text: "Error: File not found."
    end
  end
end
